title: Cellforge
description: A multi-sheet spreadsheet with a from-scratch formula engine — hand-written lexer, Pratt parser, evaluator, and one live dependency graph with topological recalc + cycle detection. NEW v7 — a STATISTICS & LINEAR-ALGEBRA engine: a genuinely-correct REGRESSION core where LINEST spills Excel's full statistics block (coefficients, standard errors, R², F, residual df, sums of squares) off a numerically-stable HOUSEHOLDER QR, plus TREND/FORECAST/LOGEST/GROWTH and the simple-regression scalars (SLOPE/INTERCEPT/RSQ/CORREL/STEYX/COVARIANCE). Dense MATRIX ALGEBRA (MMULT/MINVERSE/MDETERM/MUNIT over LU with partial pivoting — solve a linear system live in the grid). A full set of STATISTICAL DISTRIBUTIONS (Normal, Student-t, χ², Fisher's F — CDF/PDF/inverse) built on hand-rolled incomplete gamma & beta functions. On top of v6's MIXED-INTEGER PROGRAMMING (branch & bound) + SENSITIVITY REPORT (shadow prices, reduced costs, ranging); v5's two-phase SIMPLEX Solver + structured table refs; v4's spill-range refs (A1#), pivots, recursive lambdas; v3's dynamic arrays, LAMBDA/LET + MAP/REDUCE and Goal Seek; cross-sheet refs, named ranges, undo/redo, Excel dates, ~230 functions, draggable SVG charts and find & replace. 290 in-app engine self-tests.
